prompt: List cancelled general liability policies effective in 2021 with account, carrier, premium, retention ratio, and risk score.
target: select p.policy_id, p.policy_number, a.account_name, ca.carrier_name, p.line_of_business, p.effective_date, p.expiration_date, p.written_premium, p.retention_ratio, p.risk_score from policies p join accounts a on a.account_id = p.account_id join carriers ca on ca.carrier_id = p.carrier_id where p.policy_status = 'Cancelled' and p.line_of_business = 'General Liability' and p.effective_date >= date '2021-01-01' and p.effective_date < date '2022-01-01' order by p.written_premium desc, p.policy_id;
pred: select gpl.account, gpl.carrier, gp.premium, gp.retention_ratio, gp.risk_score from general_liability_policy gp join general_liability_policy_line lgp on gp.policy_id = lgp.policy_id join policy p on p.policy_id = lgp.policy_id join account a on a.account_id = p.account_id where gp.expiration_date < date '2021-01-01' and gp.status = 'cancelled' order by gp.premium desc;

pred: select a.account, c.carrier, p.premium, coalesce(t.retention_ratio, 1) as retention_ratio, r.score from commercial_auto_policies a join accounts a_account on a_account.account_id = a.account_id join carriers c on c.carrier_id = a_carrier.carrier_id join policies p on p.policy_id = a_policy.policy_id join policies_commercial_risks r on r.policy_id = p.policy_id where a.end_date < date '2026-01-01' and a.renewal_status != 'renewed' order by a.account, c.carrier, p.premium, coalesce(t.retention_ratio, 1) desc;

pred: select p.name as professional_name, ca.account_id, ca.account_number, ca.policy_start_date, ca.end_date, ca.status, ca.underwriter_name, ca.broker_name from professional_liability_accounts ca join professionals p on p.professional_id = ca.professional_id left join account_causes_of_loss cs on cs.account_id = ca.account_id left join account_types at on at.account_type_id = ca.account_type_id left join account_status AS AS ON AS.account_id = ca.account_id where ca.account_start_date >= date '2021-01-01' and ca.account_end_date <= date '2021-12-31' and ca.account_type_id = ( select id from account_types where name = 'Professional Liability Account') and ca.account_status = 'Active' order by ca.account_start_date;
